creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
thierry     2009-05-19 20:19:02 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    math                 Makefile 
    math/rkward-kde4     Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Added files:
    math/rkward-kde4/files patch-rkward_CMakeLists.txt 
                           patch-rkward_rbackend_DetectPthreads.cmake 
                           patch-rkward_rbackend_rksignalsupport.cpp 
                           patch-rkward_rbackend_rthread.cpp 
                           patch-rkward_rkward.sh.template 
  Removed files:
    math/rkward-kde4/files patch-configure 
                           patch-rkward_rbackend_rembedinternal.cpp 
  Log:
  Adding RKWard for KDE4.
  
  RKWard prior to v. 0.5 depends on KDE-3, and newer versions
  depend on KDE-4.
  
  PR:             ports/134495
